arts.ttl: Report – Germany & Poland Stars To Be Fit For Inter Milan Vs Monza Friendly Clash
arts.sum: Yann Bisseck and Piotr Zielinski will be fit to return in Inter Milan’s friendly match against Monza tomorrow. This according to today’s print edition of Rome-based newspaper Corriere dello Sport, via FCInterNews. Inter Milan will take on Monza in their penultimate friendly match of preseason tomorrow. The Nerazzurri have already faced Monaco in a warm-up […] The post Report – Germany & Poland Stars To Be Fit For Inter Milan Vs Monza Friendly Clash appeared first on SempreInter.com.
